rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Flash Player Update from Suspicious Location

rules.rule_text:
title: Flash Player Update from Suspicious Location
id: 4922a5dd-6743-4fc2-8e81-144374280997
status: test
description: Detects a flashplayer update from an unofficial location
references:
- https://gist.github.com/roycewilliams/a723aaf8a6ac3ba4f817847610935cfb
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2017-10-25
modified: 2022-08-08
tags:
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1189
- attack.execution
- attack.t1204.002
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1036.005
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
  - c-uri|contains: /flash_install.php
  - c-uri|endswith: /install_flash_player.exe
  filter:
    cs-host|endswith: .adobe.com
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown flash download locations
level: high
